title: calliandra yucatanensis
intro: Calliandra yucatanensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the powderpuff tree due to its showy, powder-like flowers. The plant is traditionally used in Mexican and Mayan medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calliandra yucatanensis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting immune function and cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Calliandra yucatanensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
